title: Finish updating to go 1.22
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Update references to specific versions of golang in the Makefile and the Cirrus CI configuration to match go.mod, and add a check in the 'vendor' target that CI runs that the image it's run inside is a close-enough match to the version listed in go.mod.

#### How to verify it

Run `make vendor-in-container`.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
